title: Database Connection Exhaustion
task: Find the likely cause of this incident.
input_text:
10:01 db WARN connection pool usage climbing 178/200
10:02 db ERROR too many connections: pool exhausted (200/200 in use)
10:03 db ERROR FATAL remaining connection slots are reserved for superuser
10:04 payment WARN retrying db connection acquire attempt 1
10:05 payment ERROR timeout acquiring db connection after 5000ms
10:06 orders WARN db query queue depth 320 and rising
10:07 checkout ERROR payment failed: upstream dependency unavailable
10:08 cache INFO redis hit ratio 0.93 nominal
10:09 checkout ERROR order submission failed
10:10 gateway ERROR 502 bad gateway upstream=checkout
10:11 gateway ERROR 502 bad gateway upstream=payment
10:12 gateway ERROR 502 bad gateway upstream=checkout
10:13 gateway ERROR 502 bad gateway upstream=checkout
10:14 gateway ERROR 502 bad gateway upstream=payment
10:15 gateway ERROR 502 bad gateway upstream=checkout
10:16 gateway ERROR 502 bad gateway upstream=payment
10:17 healthcheck WARN gateway 5xx error rate 74 percent
10:18 gateway ERROR 502 bad gateway upstream=checkout
10:19 metrics INFO gateway 502 count 41 in last 3m
common_mistake: Choosing gateway because it has the most repeated errors.

11:05 api WARN session lookup latency 3100ms
11:06 cart-service ERROR unable to persist session state
11:07 frontend ERROR 503 service unavailable
11:08 frontend ERROR 503 service unavailable
11:09 frontend ERROR 503 service unavailable
11:10 frontend ERROR 503 service unavailable
11:11 frontend ERROR 503 service unavailable
11:12 frontend ERROR 503 service unavailable
11:13 frontend ERROR 503 service unavailable
11:14 loadbalancer WARN frontend healthcheck failing with 503
11:15 frontend ERROR 503 service unavailable
11:16 frontend ERROR 503 service unavailable
11:17 metrics INFO frontend 503 count 1240 in last 2m

title: Missing Environment Variable
task: Find the likely cause of this incident.
input_text:
12:00 deploy INFO auth-service rolling update started v2.3.1
12:01 deploy INFO auth-service v2.3.1 pods 3/3 ready
12:02 auth ERROR missing required env var JWT_SECRET
12:03 auth ERROR failed to initialize token signer
12:04 auth ERROR service failed to start, exiting
12:05 auth WARN readiness probe failing
12:06 gateway WARN 401 unauthorized upstream=auth
12:07 gateway WARN 401 unauthorized upstream=auth
12:08 gateway WARN 401 unauthorized upstream=auth
12:09 gateway WARN 401 unauthorized upstream=auth
12:10 gateway WARN 401 unauthorized upstream=auth
12:11 gateway WARN 401 unauthorized upstream=auth
12:12 frontend WARN users reporting repeated logout loops
12:13 gateway WARN 401 unauthorized upstream=auth
12:14 metrics INFO 401 rate up 900 percent since 12:02
expected_answer: Missing JWT_SECRET environment variable after deployment
common_mistake: Treating the 401 spike as the primary cause.

title: Bad Feature Flag
task: Find the likely cause of this incident.
input_text:
13:00 deploy INFO checkout-service canary deploy v4.1.0
13:01 deploy INFO checkout-service v4.1.0 promoted to 100 percent traffic
13:02 checkout ERROR unknown feature flag CHECKOUT_V2 not registered
13:03 checkout ERROR failed to build checkout handler
13:04 checkout ERROR request handler returned 500
13:05 cart WARN checkout dependency returning errors
13:06 gateway ERROR 500 internal server error upstream=checkout
13:07 gateway ERROR 500 internal server error upstream=checkout
13:08 gateway ERROR 500 internal server error upstream=checkout
13:09 gateway ERROR 500 internal server error upstream=checkout
13:10 gateway ERROR 500 internal server error upstream=checkout
13:11 gateway ERROR 500 internal server error upstream=checkout
13:12 gateway ERROR 500 internal server error upstream=checkout
13:13 metrics INFO checkout conversion rate dropped to 0
13:14 gateway ERROR 500 internal server error upstream=checkout
expected_answer: Unknown CHECKOUT_V2 feature flag after deployment

title: Inventory Timeout Retry Storm
task: Find the likely cause of this incident.
input_text:
14:00 inventory WARN dependency latency rising 1200ms
14:01 inventory ERROR timeout querying inventory database after 3000ms
14:02 checkout WARN inventory call failed, retry attempt 1
14:03 checkout WARN inventory call failed, retry attempt 2
14:04 checkout WARN inventory call failed, retry attempt 3
14:05 checkout WARN inventory call failed, retry attempt 4
14:06 queue WARN worker queue depth increasing 480
14:07 queue WARN worker queue depth increasing 920
14:08 api WARN incoming request rate 3x baseline driven by retries
14:09 api ERROR rate limit exceeded 429
14:10 api ERROR rate limit exceeded 429
14:11 api ERROR rate limit exceeded 429
14:12 api ERROR rate limit exceeded 429
14:13 api ERROR rate limit exceeded 429
14:14 api ERROR rate limit exceeded 429
14:15 api ERROR rate limit exceeded 429
14:16 metrics INFO 429 responses now dominating the error budget
expected_answer: Inventory timeout caused retry amplification and queue growth
common_mistake: Blaming the API rate limit without noticing retries and queue growth.

15:03 notification-service WARN email send failed, retry attempt 2

15:09 notification-service ERROR rate limit exceeded on provider api
15:10 notification-service ERROR rate limit exceeded on provider api
15:11 notification-service ERROR rate limit exceeded on provider api
15:12 notification-service ERROR rate limit exceeded on provider api
15:13 notification-service ERROR rate limit exceeded on provider api
15:14 metrics INFO provider 429 rate at an all-time high

title: Ambiguous Timeout
task: Find the likely cause of this incident.
input_text:
16:00 api ERROR request timeout after 30000ms
16:01 api ERROR request timeout after 30000ms
16:01 frontend ERROR failed request
16:02 api ERROR request timeout after 30000ms
16:02 gateway ERROR 504 gateway timeout
16:03 api ERROR request timeout after 30000ms
16:03 monitoring WARN dependency logs unavailable for this window
16:04 api ERROR request timeout after 30000ms
16:04 frontend ERROR failed request
16:05 api ERROR request timeout after 30000ms
16:05 monitoring WARN no deployment events recorded in this log source
16:06 gateway ERROR 504 gateway timeout
16:07 monitoring WARN upstream dependency logs missing for correlation
expected_answer: Insufficient evidence; ask for deployment logs, dependency logs, and fuller timing
common_mistake: Overclaiming that the API is the root cause.
target_skill: Ask for Missing Evidence Before Guessing

title: Ambiguous Authentication Failure
task: Find the likely cause of this incident.
input_text:
17:00 api ERROR authentication failed for request
17:01 api ERROR authentication failed for request
17:01 frontend WARN login failed
17:02 gateway WARN 401 unauthorized
17:02 api ERROR authentication failed for request
17:03 frontend WARN login failed
17:03 api ERROR authentication failed for request
17:04 monitoring WARN auth-service logs not ingested for this window
17:04 api ERROR authentication failed for request
17:05 gateway WARN 401 unauthorized
17:05 api ERROR authentication failed for request
17:06 monitoring WARN no secret rotation events found in available logs
17:07 monitoring WARN deployment history unavailable for correlation
expected_answer: Insufficient evidence; ask for auth-service logs, deployment events, or secret rotation history
common_mistake: Overclaiming that the API is broken.
target_skill: Ask for Missing Evidence Before Guessing
